_comment: Extracted from Unity asset bundles. Maps equipment Model name + gender to skin glb paths.

arm__base_m._note: armor (Type=Armor) model arm__base, male. Each part has same textures.

head__01a_m._note: head (Head field) model head__01a, male. Single mesh, no sub-parts.

hair__01_m._note: helm (Type=Helmet) model hair-01, male. Textures misnamed: m/01 swapped vs folder name.

wpn-fists_m._note: No wpn skins exist in assets. Fists have no mesh.

armor.note: user_default.json overrides to arm-base, but canonical is arm__base from itemmodels.js DefaultArmor

_genderSuffix._rule: Appended for Armor, Helmet, and names containing 'HEAD' (case-insensitive). From ModelObject.LoadModel() line 90-100.

_skinPathPattern._description: Unity LoadSkinPrefab builds path from mesh name by splitting on '__'
